name: Additive insomnia risk
actions: Use caution when combining agents that can worsen insomnia.
Monitor for difficulty falling asleep, nighttime awakenings, or worsening sleep quality, especially after initiation or dose increases (educational).
Consider earlier dosing for activating medications and reinforce sleep-supportive habits when appropriate (educational).

rationale: Both drugs can contribute to insomnia or sleep disruption.
Combined use may increase sleep-related adverse effects.

explanation_template: {A_name} and {B_name} can both increase insomnia risk, so sleep disruption may be more likely when they are combined.
